parameters.query:
WITH parsed_date AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN '{{ $json.fecha }}' ~ '^\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}$' 
        THEN to_date('{{ $json.fecha }}', 'DD-MM-YYYY')
      WHEN '{{ $json.fecha }}' ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$' 
        THEN to_date('{{ $json.fecha }}', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      ELSE CURRENT_DATE
    END AS fecha
),
hora_solicitada AS (
  SELECT
    CASE 
      WHEN '{{ $json.hora ?? "" }}' ~ '^\d{2}:\d{2}'
        THEN ((SELECT fecha FROM parsed_date)::text || ' ' || '{{ $json.hora ?? "08:00" }}')::timestamp
      ELSE NULL
    END AS inicio_solicitado,
    CASE 
      WHEN '{{ $json.hora ?? "" }}' ~ '^\d{2}:\d{2}'
        THEN ((SELECT fecha FROM parsed_date)::text || ' ' || '{{ $json.hora ?? "08:00" }}')::timestamp
             + INTERVAL '{{ $json.duracion ?? 1 }} hours'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS fin_solicitado
),
asesores AS (
  SELECT u.id AS user_id, rp.name AS nombre_asesor,
         COALESCE(rp.mobile, rp.phone, '') AS telefono_asesor
  FROM res_users u
  JOIN res_partner rp ON u.partner_id = rp.id
  WHERE u.active = true
    AND u.share = false
    AND u.id > 1
),
eventos_dia AS (
  SELECT
    a.user_id,
    a.nombre_asesor,
    ce.id AS event_id,
    ce.name AS evento,
    (ce.start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil') AS inicio_local,
    (ce.stop  AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil') AS fin_local,
    to_char(ce.start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil', 'HH24:MI') AS hora_inicio,
    to_char(ce.stop  AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil', 'HH24:MI') AS hora_fin,
    CASE
      WHEN hs.inicio_solicitado IS NOT NULL
        AND (ce.start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil') < hs.fin_solicitado
        AND (ce.stop  AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil') > hs.inicio_solicitado
      THEN true
      ELSE false
    END AS hay_conflicto
  FROM asesores a
  CROSS JOIN parsed_date pd
  CROSS JOIN hora_solicitada hs
  JOIN calendar_event ce ON ce.active = true
    AND (ce.start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')::date = pd.fecha
    AND (
      ce.user_id = a.user_id
      OR ce.id IN (
        SELECT event_id FROM calendar_attendee 
        WHERE partner_id = (SELECT partner_id FROM res_users WHERE id = a.user_id)
          AND state != 'declined'
      )
    )
)
SELECT
  a.user_id,
  a.nombre_asesor,
  a.telefono_asesor,
  pd.fecha::text                                    AS fecha_consultada,
  '{{ $json.hora ?? "" }}'                          AS hora_solicitada,
  COALESCE(BOOL_OR(ed.hay_conflicto), false)        AS hora_ocupada,
  CASE
    WHEN BOOL_OR(ed.hay_conflicto) THEN 
      'CONFLICTO: ' || a.nombre_asesor || ' ya tiene cita en ese horario'
    WHEN COUNT(ed.event_id) = 0 THEN 
      'Totalmente disponible'
    WHEN COUNT(ed.event_id) < 4 THEN 
      'Parcialmente disponible (' || COUNT(ed.event_id) || ' citas)'
    ELSE 
      'Agenda muy llena (' || COUNT(ed.event_id) || ' citas)'
  END                                               AS disponibilidad,
  COALESCE(
    json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'hora_inicio', ed.hora_inicio,
        'hora_fin',    ed.hora_fin,
        'evento',      ed.evento,
        'conflicto',   ed.hay_conflicto
      ) ORDER BY ed.inicio_local
    ) FILTER (WHERE ed.event_id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::json
  )                                                 AS horarios_ocupados
FROM asesores a
CROSS JOIN parsed_date pd
LEFT JOIN eventos_dia ed ON ed.user_id = a.user_id
GROUP BY a.user_id, a.nombre_asesor, a.telefono_asesor, pd.fecha
ORDER BY COALESCE(BOOL_OR(ed.hay_conflicto), false) ASC, COUNT(ed.event_id) ASC;
